'''jathudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenanthotoxin|oenanthotoxin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenanthotoxin|oenanthotoxin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jathudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæthidhith|jæthidhith]] || [[word:jæthidhij|jæthidhij]] || [[word:jæthidhish|jæthidhish]] || [[word:jæthidhi|jæthidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathuthudhuth|jathuthudhuth]] || [[word:jathuthudhuj|jathuthudhuj]] || [[word:jathuthudhush|jathuthudhush]] || [[word:jathuthudhu|jathuthudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathudhuth|jathudhuth]] || [[word:jathudhuj|jathudhuj]] || [[word:jathudhush|jathudhush]] || [[word:jathudhu|jathudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathufdhufth|jathufdhufth]] || [[word:jathufdhufj|jathufdhufj]] || [[word:jathufdhufsh|jathufdhufsh]] || [[word:jathufdhuf|jathufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jathudhuthu|jathudhuthu]] || [[word:jathudhuju|jathudhuju]] || [[word:jathudhushu|jathudhushu]] || [[word:jathudhuku|jathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jathudhuth|jathudhuth]] || [[word:jathudhuj|jathudhuj]] || [[word:jathudhush|jathudhush]] || [[word:jathudhu|jathudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jathudhuthul|jathudhuthul]] || [[word:jathudhujul|jathudhujul]] || [[word:jathudhushul|jathudhushul]] || [[word:jathudhukul|jathudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jathudhuuthuthu|jathudhuuthuthu]] || [[word:jathudhuujuju|jathudhuujuju]] || [[word:jathudhuushushu|jathudhuushushu]] || [[word:jathudhuuku|jathudhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jathudhuthun|jathudhuthun]] || [[word:jathudhujun|jathudhujun]] || [[word:jathudhushun|jathudhushun]] || [[word:jathudhukun|jathudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jathudhuthuoro|jathudhuthuoro]] || [[word:jathudhujuoro|jathudhujuoro]] || [[word:jathudhushuoro|jathudhushuoro]] || [[word:jathudhukuoro|jathudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
